name: node-eslint-utils
title: node-eslint-utils
description:
utilities for ESLint plugins
eslint-utils provides utility functions and classes
for making ESLint custom rules.
.
ESLint is a tool for identifying and reporting on patterns
found in ECMAScript/JavaScript code.
.
Node.js is an event-based server-side JavaScript engine.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use node-eslint-utils because utilities for ESLint plugins.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use node-eslint-utils as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-eslint-utils with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-eslint-utils --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
